description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-meter` (T3-03) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-meter/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, value/min/max/low/high/optimum typed as numbers
2. Accessibility — uses native `<meter>` element or `role="meter"`, aria-valuenow/min/max, accessible label required, value description (good/bad/meh) communicated to screen readers, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all value ranges, low/high/optimum thresholds, label, all sizes, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — different value levels showing good/warning/bad states
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, color changes at thresholds (not hardcoded), CSS parts (track, fill, label)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-meter/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-meter — T3-03 antagonistic quality review
